name: @observer-protocol/l402-op-authorize
description: Observer Protocol authorization for L402 / Lightning (lnget buyer + Aperture seller). Verifies a signed, revocable did:key delegation against the proposed L402 payment at the buyer side, fail-closed, and verifies a holder-bound credential presentation at the seller side. Same vendored core as ows-op-verify and mppx-op-account: only the decoder changed.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --external:viem --outfile=dist/index.mjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --external:viem --outfile=dist/index.cjs && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run fixtures && node test/run.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:core-sync && npm run typecheck && npm test
